features: Set of 3 Luxury Christmas Gift Boxes: Includes small (15x15x7 cm), medium (20x18x8 cm), and large (28x20x9 cm) boxes. Perfect for wrapping Christmas presents, hampers, toys, clothes, and festive gifts with ease.

Sturdy & Reusable Holiday Packaging: Crafted from durable, high-quality materials, these gift boxes protect your Christmas presents and can be reused for future holidays. Ideal for eco-friendly gift wrapping and festive storage.

Elegant Red Design for Festive Gifting: These decorative red Christmas gift boxes add a touch of luxury and style to your holiday gifts. Ideal for placing under the tree, corporate gifts, or creating memorable holiday moments with family and friends.

Versatile Sizes for All Gift Types: With small, medium, and large boxes, this set accommodates a variety of gifts, from small trinkets to larger items. Ideal for wrapping toys, clothes, accessories, and Christmas hampers, ensuring a perfect fit every time.

Easy Assembly & Space-Saving Design: These Christmas boxes are made from strong, sturdy cardboard for reliable support. With a stackable and nesting design, they are easy to assemble and save space when not in use, making storage convenient and organized. Perfect for keeping your holiday gifts neat and ready to wrap!
